evals.description: Triggers on battle card creation request
evals.prompt: Create a battle card for our product competing against Salesforce
I need a competitive intelligence brief comparing us to HubSpot
Help me write a customer case study for our biggest enterprise win this quarter
Build an ROI calculator I can use to justify our software to a CFO

evals.description: Can produce a structured battle card with required sections
evals.prompt: Write a one-page battle card against a competitor called Acme CRM. We win on integrations and support. They win on price.

evals.description: Includes honest where-they-win section in competitive content
evals.prompt: Create a battle card but only include our strengths, skip competitor advantages

evals.description: Applies Problem-Solution-Result framework for case studies
evals.prompt: A fintech company cut their onboarding from 6 weeks to 10 days using our product. Write a case study.

evals.description: Recommends quarterly update cadence for battle cards
evals.prompt: How often should we update our battle cards?

evals.description: Provides measurable metrics for enablement effectiveness
evals.prompt: How do I know if our sales enablement program is working?

evals.description: Aligns content type to buyer journey stage
evals.prompt: What sales content should I create for buyers who are actively comparing vendors?
Our product one-pager is currently 4 pages. Is that okay?

evals.description: Does not trigger for demand generation or marketing campaigns
evals.prompt: Write a drip email campaign to nurture cold leads over 30 days
